title: Spiced Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from the Syrian cuisine, perfect for a summer night. This recipe serves 4-6 people and can be adjusted to suit your taste.

ingredients.name: Lamb
ingredients.notes: preferably leg of lamb or shoulder

instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine kebab marinade ingredients: 2 cloves of garlic, 1 tablespoon olive oil, 1 tablespoon lemon juice, 1 teaspoon dried oregano, 1/2 teaspoon ground cumin, 1/4 teaspoon cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb to the blender and blend until well combined.
Thread the lamb, onion, bell pepper, and tomato onto skewers.
Brush the skewers with the remaining olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb reaches a minimum internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
Serve with a side of rice, salad, or pita bread.
For a more intense flavor, let the lamb marinate for 30 minutes to 1 hour before grilling.
